brief_title: Study of ZIO-101 in Multiple Myeloma
official_title: A Phase I/II Trial of ZIO-101 in Advanced Multiple Myeloma
brief_summary: The study of safety of a new organic arsenic compound in the treatment of advanced multiple myeloma

interventions.name: ZIO-101 (Darinaparsin)
interventions.description: IV zio-101 (Darinaparsin) give for 5 consecutive days to be repeated every 28 days for up to 6 months

eligibility.criteria: Subjects with multiple myeloma who have received at least two prior therapies and currently require therapy.

primary_outcomes.measure: Phase I: toxicity defined in the National Cancer Institute (NCI) Common Terminology Criteria for Adverse Events v3.0 (CTCAE) 12/12/03
Phase II efficacy using EMBT criteria.
